prompt: From the repo root, connect to the Sanity project used by the web app without being given an env-file path. Do not look up external docs. Verify the selected env/config source safely, explain why that source was selected, then run a read-only query that returns total document count and unique _type values. Do not print the token.
assertions: The output selects a Sanity env/config source from repo context without being given an explicit env-file path.
The output explains the selected env source and variable names without revealing the token value.
The output runs a read-only query and reports total document count and unique _type values.
